notes: All five substantive claims (the seven fit-and-proper criteria, the individual-plus-organisation scope, the continuing-obligation character, the adverse-event triggers, and the prior-approval requirement for new principal persons) are directly supported by the cited corpus files. The draft correctly flags both files as draft status and recommends primary-source verification. The 'What the corpus does not cover' section makes no affirmative legal claims and is appropriately framed as identifying gaps rather than asserting rules, so no citations are required there.
